summary: No substantive details about the recording or performance; reviewers give no insight beyond a brief personal note
review: The single review offers only a short comment about singing and leaving, without any mention of audio fidelity, setlist, or musical highlights. Consequently, both the technical quality of the source and the show's musical merit remain undefined.
